calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-08-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:41am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Quing Mei Hua and Donald Ng appear in pro per. Respondent, J. Yo Wong appears in pro per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHR (A) packet of documents including description of events and real estate documents.
EXHA (1) Photo of store front & outline of case.

11:21am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Judgment Entered
